name: analyze
_note: Runs the real static analyzer over submitted source — tokenizes + walks it, producing per-line findings, complexity/duplication metrics, a maintainability index, and a letter grade. No DB, no network (pure compute over the input string). {} has no source → no_source_provided; empty source → all_files_empty; real source → ok:true with a full scan. Each scan is appended to per-user STATE for later annotate/debt/hotspots/trend (NEVER no_db).
